basic_details.job_title: CUG Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant / Field Investigators Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Gujarat (CUG) Research Assistant / Field Investigators Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.cug.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CUG Research Assistant / Field Investigators Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks, NET/SET/M.Phil/Ph.D. cleared (for Research Assistant)
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Must have cleared NET/SET/M.Phil/Ph.D. Field Investigators: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks.

salary_details.details: Research Assistant: Rs. 37000 Per Month Field Investigators: Rs. 20000 Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification and suitability Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUG Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.central_university_of_gujarat_cug: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks, NET/SET/M.Phil/Ph.D. cleared (for Research Assistant)

content_sections.heading: CUG Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CUG Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CUG Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Must have cleared NET/SET/M.Phil/Ph.D. Field Investigators: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Salary/ Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: Rs. 37000 Per Month Field Investigators: Rs. 20000 Per Month

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on qualification and suitability Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CUG Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUG Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Central University of Gujarat recruitment is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Assistant and Field Investigators?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies. One position is for a Research Assistant, and two positions are for Field Investigators.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: A postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks is required for both Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any specific qualification for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Research Assistant post, candidates must have cleared NET/SET/M.Phil/Ph.D. in addition to the postgraduate degree.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the CUG recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 40 years. There is no mention of minimum age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for a Research Assistant is Rs. 37,000 per month, and for Field Investigators, it is Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the CUG Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and suitability, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. How should candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. They should prepare their application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CUG Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link, and also on the Central University of Gujarat's official website.
